age.Description: Self-reported age in years. Question: 'What is your age?'

gender.Description: Self-reported gender. Question: 'What is your gender?'

handedness.Description: Self-reported dominant hand. Question: 'Which is your dominant hand?'

alcohol_last_hour.Description: Question: 'Have you drunk alcohol in the last hour?'

caffeine_last_hour.Description: Question: 'Have you consumed any caffeinated beverages in the last hour?'

exercise_last_hour.Description: Question: 'Have you exercised vigorously in the last hour?'

hours_sleep.Description: Question: 'How much sleep did you get last night?' ORDINAL CATEGORY, not a continuous value — responses are unevenly spaced bins and should not be averaged as numeric hours.

stress.Description: Question: 'How stressed do you currently feel?' 5-point scale.

last_ate.Description: Question: 'When was the last time you ate?' ORDINAL CATEGORY, not a continuous value — ordered time bins, do not average as numeric hours.

hunger_1to10.Description: Question: 'On a scale from 1 to 10, how would you rate your current hunger level?'

diet_raw.Description: Verbatim response(s) to: 'In general, which of the following food groups do you NOT eat? Please select all that apply. If you generally eat all of these food groups, please select the last response.' Multi-select; multiple exclusions separated by '; '.

diet_type.Description: Dietary category derived from the exclusion pattern using a strict nested ladder (omnivore < avoids_red_meat < pescatarian < vegetarian < vegan). Non-nested exclusion patterns are coded 'other'. Derived classification, not a self-reported diet identity.

Levels.pescatarian: Excludes red meat + poultry, eats fish
Levels.vegetarian: Excludes red meat + poultry + fish, eats dairy
Levels.vegan: Excludes red meat + poultry + fish + dairy

n_categorize_trials.Description: Number of categorization trials recorded (37 unique images shown twice; up to ~74).

mean_accuracy.Description: Proportion of categorization trials answered correctly (response key matched stimulus category).

has_resting_baseline.Description: Whether eyes-open and eyes-closed resting segments are present.

sampling_frequency_hz.Description: EEG sampling rate in Hz (uniform across the dataset).

berger_alpha_ratio.Description: Ratio of posterior alpha power (8–12 Hz, O1/O2/P7/P8) eyes-closed vs eyes-open. Values >1 indicate expected alpha reactivity.
